scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Starting Fall 2026, t he University of Miami will require standardized test scores for most applicants. This means that when applying via the Common Application, prospective students should self-report their SAT/ACT test scores.

claims.claim: Starting Fall 2026, t he University of Miami will require standardized test scores for most applicants. This means that when applying via the Common Application, prospective students should self-report their SAT/ACT test scores.
